name: Loan Inc
description_short: Loan Inc. is a tech-enabled mortgage lender offering home purchase and refinance loans with no lender fees, backed by human loan experts and a Rate Match Promise.
description_long:
Loan Inc. was founded in 2016 as a rebranded version of LoanVerify, positioning itself as a modern mortgage lender that combines technology with human expertise. The company focuses on making the mortgage process transparent and convenient for both home buyers and those refinancing existing mortgages. Their core mission emphasizes low rates, no lender fees, and personalized guidance from real loan experts.

Loan Inc. offers mortgage services for both home purchases and refinances. For buyers, they provide customized loan options, rate matching through their Rate Match Promise, and competitive closing timelines (as fast as 12 days). For refinancers, they offer no lender fees, no title insurance costs, flexible loan terms (8 to 30 years), home value analysis, and proactive rate monitoring. Their process begins with a soft pull (no credit check initially), followed by expert consultation, document submission, and closing.

The company distinguishes itself through several specific features: real human loan experts paired with proprietary technology (including SmartEstimate®), partnership coordination with real estate agents, availability nights and weekends, and customized loan terms tailored to individual situations. They emphasize transparency in their fee structure and claim to help borrowers find better rates or qualify for specific programs.

Loan Inc. appears well-suited for borrowers seeking a streamlined, technology-forward mortgage experience with transparent pricing. However, the website provides no information about loan limits, geographic availability, credit score requirements, interest rate ranges, or specific APR disclosures—standard details necessary for comparing mortgage offerings. Their claims about rates and terms cannot be verified from the content provided.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No lender fees and no title insurance costs on refinances, reducing closing costs
Rate Match Promise backs their rates competitively against market options
Initial pre-qualification requires no hard credit pull, allowing borrowers to explore options without impact
Real loan experts available via secure chat nights and weekends for ongoing support
Fast closing timelines (as little as 12 days for home purchases)
Flexible refinance loan terms ranging from 8 to 30 years
Proactive rate monitoring that notifies borrowers when lower rates become available
cons: Website provides no specific information about interest rates, APRs, or rate ranges available
No disclosure of loan amount limits, minimum credit scores, or geographic service areas
Limited details about fees beyond claiming 'no lender fees'—origination, appraisal, and other third-party costs unclear
No transparent pricing calculator or rate quotes available without contacting company
No independent reviews, customer satisfaction data, or complaint information provided on website
best_for: Home buyers seeking a streamlined, tech-enabled mortgage experience with expert guidance
Homeowners refinancing who want transparent pricing and proactive rate monitoring
Borrowers comfortable with digital interaction who prefer human expert support alongside technology
Clients working with real estate agents who value lender coordination with their agent
diagnosis: Loan Inc. is best for borrowers seeking a convenient, transparent mortgage experience that combines technology with human expert support. The primary caveat is that the website lacks critical borrowing information—no published rates, APRs, loan limits, or geographic availability—making it impossible to assess actual terms or competitiveness without direct contact with the company.
services: Mortgage refinancing with flexible terms (8-30 years)
Rate matching through Rate Match Promise
Initial pre-qualification with soft credit pull (no hard inquiry)
Customized loan options based on borrower situation
Expert loan consultant guidance via secure chat
SmartEstimate® technology for seamless process management
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
